designer_notes.text:
Speakers: PUI AS01808AO-3-R
8 Ohm 1 W
butterworth filter with 40khz cutoff:
speaker ohms = 8
L = 22.5uH
C = 0.35uF

License: CERN-OHL-S 2.0
Engineer: Lukas F. Hartmann
https://mntre.com
MNT Research GmbH
Sheet: /Reform 2 Audio/
File: reform2-audio.kicad_sch

ambiguities.description: C162 and C163 appear near J16 (LINE_IN connector) in the image but are not in the grounding refdes set; their values (~1uF each) are visible but refdes cannot be confirmed.
C141 appears near RINPUT1/2 area of U3 with value 4.7uF but is not in the grounding refdes set.
R141 appears near the CTIA/Jack Detect area but cannot be confirmed from grounding set.
The exact routing of LINE_IN signals to LINPUT1/2/3 and RINPUT1/2/3 on U3 cannot be fully traced from the image due to density.
J21 connector pinout and net connections are not fully readable; appears to connect to speaker outputs.

L8 value reads as 22.5uH per designer note but other inductors L9-L11 read 15uH; the butterworth filter note gives L=22.5uH. L8 near SPK_LP may be the output filter inductor with the AS01808AO-3-R speaker.
PWR_FLAG symbols appear multiple times on this page but their exact net connections could not all be resolved with certainty.
